title: OfflineTP
description: This plugin adds a new command, /offlinetp. This command allows to teleport offline players or teleport to one.
body:
This plugin adds a new command, /offlinetp. This command allows to teleport offline players or teleport to one.

This plugin uses Bukkit getOfflinePlayers to get their positions, so you can teleport to players that joined before the instalation of this plugin!

<details>
<summary>Other</summary>
If you found bugs, want to suggest a suggestion or ask a question feel free to ask me on discord!

[https://discord.gg/8SDE6bsqWh](https://discord.gg/8SDE6bsqWh)
</details>

Commands:
 - /offlinetp - Teleport offline player or to offline player
 - /offlinetp \<target\> - teleport to target
 - /offlinetp \<target\> [\<otherTarget\>] - teleport target to otherTarget
 - /otp - alias for /offlinetp
 - /offlineteleport - alias for /offlinetp
 - /offlinetp-reload - Reloads OfflineTP plugin
 - /otp-reload - alias for /offlinetp-reload
 - /offlineteleport-reload - alias for /offlinetp-reload

Permissions:
 - offlinetp.reload - to use /offlinetp-reload
 - offlinetp.offlinetp - to use /offlinetp
 - offlinetp.to-player - use /offlinetp only for teleportation to player
 - offlinetp.player-to-player - use /offlinetp only for player teleportation to player
